name: microlight-console
description: A lightweight desktop console for building, launching, and monitoring local Spring Boot microservices.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @microlight/shared && npm run dev -w @microlight/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @microlight/shared && npm run build -w @microlight/server && npm run build -w @microlight/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run package:win -w @microlight/desktop
